ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH M. FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF KEATON ANDERSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARISSA BIESCHKE IS PRESENT. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, KEATON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIESCHKE, KARISSA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $775.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
